design_philosophy: A highly immersive, mobile-first 'Link-in-Bio' experience that feels like an exclusive artist launchpad. Dark premium aesthetic driven by cinematic lighting, deep shadows, and neon highlights. The layout breaks the traditional Linktree grid by using atmospheric background blending, glassmorphic floating cards, and high-contrast typography to draw attention to music releases and pre-saves.

body.usage: Bio text, track titles, secondary labels

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Mobile-first, single-column stack. Heavy use of vertical rhythm to separate the hero identity from the actionable links. Elements must breathe with generous padding.
spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 w-full pb-24
spacing_and_layout.gaps: gap-4 for related items (cards), gap-12 for distinct sections

surfaces.name: Glass Card
surfaces.classes: bg-[#141414]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-lg transition-all duration-300

surfaces.name: Pre-save Card
surfaces.classes: relative bg-[#141414] rounded-2xl border border-white/10 overflow-hidden group

hero_section.layout: Centered stack. Background image anchored at top with massive bottom gradient fade to #0A0A0A.
hero_section.avatar: w-32 h-32 md:w-40 md:h-40 rounded-full border border-white/20 shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(124,77,255,0.3)] object-cover mb-6
hero_section.title: Gradient text 'KALMORI' style: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-[#7C4DFF] to-[#E040FB]

social_links.layout: Horizontal flex row, centered, wrapping if needed. gap-4
social_links.icon_style: w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 flex items-center justify-center text-white/80 hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-colors

release_card.layout: Flex row (image left, text right). p-3 gap-4. Glassmorphism surface.
release_card.action: Right-aligned play button or 'Listen' text. Hovering card adds a subtle border glow in accent colors.

pre_save_card.layout: Bento-style or feature card. Use 'Tracing Beam' or subtle animated gradient background behind the border to indicate 'upcoming/exclusive' status.
pre_save_card.cta_button: w-full py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#7C4DFF] to-[#E040FB] text-white font-bold rounded-full hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(224,64,251,0.4)] transition-all

sticky_cta.layout: Fixed bottom banner for 'Share Link' or 'Follow'.
sticky_cta.style: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 border-t border-white/10 p-4 flex justify-center w-full z-50 max-w-xl mx-auto left-0 right-0

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and borders brighten to border-white/30 or accent color. Social icons invert (bg-white text-black).
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-in. Hero loads first, followed by social row, then music cards sliding up slightly (framer-motion).

hero_background.description: Abstract purple and black cinematic concert light to use as the top background. MUST fade smoothly into the black page body.

artist_avatar.description: Moody musician portrait with helmet and acoustic guitar

album_covers.title: Midnight Echoes
album_covers.description: Abstract black and white wavy faces

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="artist-avatar"`, `data-testid="social-link-spotify"`, `data-testid="play-track-button"`, `data-testid="presave-button"`).

dependencies_to_install: yarn add react-icons framer-motion lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Set up a dark premium mobile-first wrapper (<main className='min-h-screen bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white relative'>). 2. Add the hero background image positioned absolute at top with a massive gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A0A0A] via-[#0A0A0A]/80 to-transparent) so it fades perfectly into the rest of the page. 3. Build a max-w-xl container in the center for all content. 4. Use Outfit for headings and Manrope for body. 5. Construct Social Links using react-icons (FaSpotify, FaApple, FaInstagram, etc). 6. Render Release Cards using glassmorphism borders and backgrounds. 7. Implement a striking Pre-Save campaign block with gradient CTA button. 8. NEVER use placeholder image URLs. Rely exclusively on the media URLs provided here. 9. Add data-testid to every button and link.
